channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top 3 Diether Ocampo Movies Worth Watching
item.description: The article highlights three notable films directed by Diether Ocampo, emphasizing their lasting impact on Filipino cinema. These movies, part of ABS-CBN's filmography, are celebrated for their storyt...

item.title: Mary Habila's Death Investigation Continues Amid Legal and Family Disputes
item.description: The death of 26-year-old Mary Habila, found naked and lifeless with blood around her nose and mouth at Senator David Umahi's residence in Ebonyi State, has sparked a legal investigation. The Ebonyi St...

item.title: Nadia Mukami Opens Up About Her Split From Arrow Bwoy
item.description: Nadia Mukami, renowned Kenyan singer, shared her emotional journey through a heartfelt interview with Alex Mwakideu, detailing her painful breakup from fellow artist Arrow Bwoy. The split occurred dur...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford Orders MPPs to Reimburse for Unlawful Toronto Hotel Expenses
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has condemned 16 Progressive Conservative MPPs for reimbursing over $100,000 in Toronto hotel stays despite representing Toronto-area ridings. The premier called the expenses...

item.title: Symbiotic Relationships in Tanzania's Wilderness
item.description: The article explores the hidden alliances and mutualistic relationships among wildlife in Tanzania's ecosystems. It highlights the symbiotic bond between oxpeckers, buffalo, and rhinos, where the bird...

item.title: Big Bear Teen's Tragic Fall Sparks Plans for Bakery in Her Name
item.description: An 18-year-old woman, Bella Fanuele, died after falling from a bridge support structure in Big Bear, California, on Tuesday night. Identified as a recent high school graduate and aspiring baker, Fanue...

item.title: Fruit Fly Sperm Mechanics: How They Avoid Tangling Through Opposite Movement
item.description: A study published in Nature Physics reveals that fruit fly sperm, which are nearly 40 times longer than human sperm, avoid tangling by moving in opposite directions within their storage sacs. Research...

item.title: Sen. Warner Criticizes Media for Airplay of Trump's Election Fraud Claims, AI's Role in Political Propaganda
item.description: U.S. Senator Mark Warner (D-VA) publicly criticized CBS News for broadcasting Donald Trump's election fraud speech, calling it a 'rehash of falsehoods' and demanding media outlets push back against mi...

item.title: Madlanga Commission probes 2021 Port Shepstone drug bust and police corruption allegations
item.description: The Madlanga Commission continues its investigation into the high-profile 2021 Port Shepstone cocaine seizure, where 541kg of drugs were initially confiscated by police. However, the case took a drama...

item.title: Victorian Liberal leadership faces internal challenges as Deeming's disendorsement unfolds
item.description: The article discusses the political turmoil within Victoria's Liberal Party following Moira Deeming's anticipated disendorsement. Deeming, an upper house MP, had previously sued former leader Matthew ...

item.title: Senator Padilla Condemns China Daily's Offensive Video on West Philippine Sea Arbitral Award
item.description: Senator Robinhood Padilla's office condemned the 'racist and demeaning' content published by China Daily regarding the 2016 West Philippine Sea arbitral award, calling it 'unacceptable and deserving o...

item.title: US Strikes Target Civilian Infrastructure in Southern Iran, Killing Civilians
item.description: The United States has launched military strikes against civilian infrastructure in southern Iran, resulting in casualties and widespread damage. The attacks, which targeted bridges and power plants, h...

item.title: Ontario Wildfires Threaten Communities as Smoke Persists and Federal Aid is Requested
item.description: Wildfires continue to burn across northern Ontario, with smoke affecting air quality and prompting evacuations. Environment Canada warns that while conditions may temporarily improve for some areas on...

item.title: Mike Sonko and Activist Clash Over Abducted Kenyan Families' Fate
item.description: A street confrontation between Mike Sonko and an activist has sparked heated debates on Kenyan social media. The activist, dressed in a Kenyan flag, confronted Sonko over the alleged enforced disappea...

item.title: Pawan Khera urges Sonam Wangchuk to end indefinite fast as protest over alleged NEET irregularities enters 20th day
item.description: Congress leader Pawan Khera met activist Sonam Wangchuk and other protesters at Jantar Mantar on Friday as Wangchuk's indefinite hunger strike over alleged irregularities in the education system and t...

item.title: Ramaphosa asks High Court to suspend impeachment inquiry pending review of Phala Phala report
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has approached the Western Cape Division of the High Court in Cape Town on an urgent basis to stop Parliament's impeachment committee from proceeding while he challenges the ...

item.title: Tanzania's Government and NGOs Collaborate to Align Projects with Vision 2050
item.description: Tanzania's government is calling on non-governmental organizations to realign their programs with the nation's Development Vision 2050, shifting from short-term projects to long-term strategic partner...

item.title: US visa regulations limit duration for students, journalists under Trump administration
item.description: The Trump administration has implemented stricter visa regulations affecting foreign students, cultural exchange visitors, and journalists. New rules set fixed durations for F visas (up to four years)...

item.title: J.D. Vance's Unusual Travel Demands Spark Frustration Among Secret Service Agents
item.description: The article details how J.D. Vance's last-minute, high-cost travel demands have frustrated Secret Service agents assigned to protect him and his family. These include using government helicopters for ...

item.title: Thunderstorm warning issued for Calgary amid heatwave conditions
item.description: Environment Canada has issued a thunderstorm warning for Calgary on Friday, July 17, 2026, as the city experiences unusually high temperatures and humidity. The advisory highlights the potential for s...
